_comment: Reproducible inputs for the OV-vs-vLLM bench on Panther Lake. text_only prompts exercise the LLM path; vision prompts exercise the VLM image-token path. max_tokens is intentionally small so the bench finishes in minutes per backend, not hours.

text_only.prompt: In one sentence, what is the capital of France?
List five steps a new engineer should take in their first week at a hardware company. Be concise.
Explain how an integrated GPU shares memory with the CPU on a modern laptop SoC, and why this affects memory bandwidth for ML workloads. Keep it under 200 words.

vision.prompt: Describe this image in one sentence.
vision._note: Operator supplies an image file under data/images/ before running the vision rows; bench will SKIP rows whose image is missing.

vision.prompt: List every distinct object you can see, one per line.
